steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Each dimension increases by 20%, so the scale factor per dimension is $1.2$. Area scales by the square of the linear scale factor: $(1.2)^2 = 1.44$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Multiply the original area by the scale factor: $3{,}200 \times 1.44 = 4{,}608$ square inches.
